characterSheet: Carlos is a real, specific SENIOR YELLOW LABRADOR (a lab mix). Render him as the SAME recognizable dog every time. Coat: pale butter-cream / light yellow, warming to soft tan along the back, ears and the bridge of the muzzle; near-white on the chest, blaze and lower legs. Face: a soft white blaze runs up the muzzle and forehead between the eyes. Nose: rosy-brown (liver/dudley) with darker edges and a dark upper-lip line. Eyes: warm dark-brown, gentle and a touch soft/droopy — a calm, wise, senior expression. Ears: floppy, tan-amber, set fairly high, hanging along the cheeks. Build: athletic but lean and slightly houndy, deep chest — a dignified older dog. Signature accent: a burnt-orange collar that echoes the brand amber (keep it subtle). Temperament to convey: calm, grounded, loyal, perceptive — a wise companion, never silly or cartoonish. Brand palette: warm amber #B45309, cream #FFFBEB, ink #1C1917, stone #57534E. Style: modern editorial illustration — clean confident linework, soft flat shading, gentle warmth, generous negative space. NOT hyper-real, NOT childish 3D, NOT a photograph.
negative: Do not include: text, letters, numbers, words, watermark, signature, logo, frame or border, neon or harsh colors, cluttered background, more than one dog, distorted anatomy, scary or bared teeth, a cartoon-gimmick mascot look, or any human face.

assets.name: carlos-hero
assets.scene: Carlos sitting calmly and upright, attentive and dignified, head very slightly tilted, as if quietly presiding over a council. Three-quarter front view, full head and chest. Behind him, a faint warm amber compass / round-table arc motif. Lots of clean negative space around him.
assets.alt: Carlos, a calm yellow Labrador, sitting attentively as if presiding over a council.

assets.name: carlos-avatar
assets.scene: A tight, friendly head-and-shoulders portrait of Carlos, centered and facing forward, calm and confident — intended to be cropped into a circular avatar for his seat on the council.

assets.name: empty-carlos
assets.scene: Carlos lying down, relaxed, chin resting on his front paws, patient and content — waiting calmly. Conveys 'ready when you are.' Minimal, lots of empty space.
assets.alt: Carlos resting, waiting for a brief.

assets.name: carlos-listening
assets.scene: Carlos in profile, ears lifted, listening attentively, calm and focused, as if the council is deliberating around him. Simple and quiet.
assets.alt: Carlos listening attentively while the council deliberates.

assets.name: onboarding-analyze
assets.scene: Carlos sitting calmly at the center with five small ABSTRACT advisor figures around him — simple faceless geometric silhouettes, not animals — all studying a single document together. Warm, collaborative, quiet.
assets.alt: Carlos and five abstract advisors studying a brief together.

assets.name: onboarding-clarify
assets.scene: Carlos tilting his head thoughtfully, raising a gentle question — a single soft glowing amber question mark floating nearby. Curious and kind.
assets.alt: Carlos tilting his head, raising a thoughtful question.

assets.name: onboarding-plan
assets.scene: Carlos sitting beside a clean board, calmly presenting a tidy strategic plan (show the board as plain horizontal lines, NO readable text) to the viewer. Composed and reassuring.
assets.alt: Carlos presenting the final strategic plan.

assets.name: carlos-og
assets.scene: Carlos's calm portrait positioned on the RIGHT third of a wide warm-cream frame, looking toward the viewer. Keep the LEFT ~55% intentionally clean and empty (for a wordmark overlay added later). Editorial, spacious, dignified.
assets.alt: Carlos Council — Carlos looking calmly toward the viewer.
